nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: I use it to generate ideas for sales and marketing emails

nodes.label: Personal voice in email writing
nodes.grounding_span: I want the tone to sound like me

nodes.label: AI for menial tasks
nodes.grounding_span: utilizing AI for more routine, menial tasks

nodes.label: AI for one-off tasks vs. foundational knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: new people joining will then not learn properly how to do these tasks on their own

nodes.label: Creative inspiration and ideation
nodes.grounding_span: set me apart from the competition and resonate with my customers

nodes.label: Authentic personal expression
nodes.grounding_span: I want the tone to sound like me

nodes.label: Skill development and learning
nodes.grounding_span: not know how to identify if there is an error with the AI

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: I am generally satisfied with the result of what I am using AI for

nodes.label: Concern about AI undermining learning
nodes.grounding_span: I do have concern that new people joining will then not learn properly

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: if it does not spark inspiration right away I will go back and forth, refining my thoughts

nodes.label: Strategic phased adoption with safeguards
nodes.grounding_span: I will slowly test out using it for routine and menial tasks
